{{Quote|You sound like a festerin' jizz-box. I got a festerin' jizz-box right over there in that corner.|The assistant manager of the Wookiee's Codpiece|<ref name="Twilight" />}}
The '''jizz-box''' was a [[Music/Legends|musical]] device.<ref name="Twilight" /> In [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' is set thirteen [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the events of {{Film|IV}}, which corresponds to [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]] according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the [[3PO-series protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], who was stranded on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Nim Drovis]], auditioned to perform at a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] called the [[Wookiee's Codpiece]]. C-3PO performed by playing back songs stored in his [[Memory bank/Legends|memory core]] with his [[Vocabulator/Legends|vocabulator]]. The [[Unidentified assistant manager|assistant manager]] of the establishment told the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] that he sounded like a festering [[Jizz/Legends|jizz]]-box and rejected him, saying the Codpiece already had a jizz-box to play.<ref name="Twilight" />

==Behind the scenes==
The jizz-box was mentioned in ''[[Planet of Twilight]]'', a [[1997]] novel by [[Barbara Hambly]].<ref name="Twilight" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' {{1stm|[[Planet of Twilight (abridged audiobook)|audiobook]]}}
*[[Planet of Twilight (abridged audiobook)|''Planet of Twilight'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}}
